raw_notes: African branch of Eft-Systems Gmbh. Established in Kenya in July 2021, aims to introduce BYD technology in the sub-Saharan market by developing local after-sales service.
Mission is to make solar energy accessible to everyone. Self-described as the Best Solar Company in Kenya. Empowering a global lifestyle with a brighter and greener tomorrow.
Leading solar energy company dedicated to making a positive impact. Story began with a deep-rooted desire to give back to homeland and create a brighter future for generations to come.

Leading renewable energy company dedicated to providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Kenya and the East African region. Specializes in design, supply, installation, and maintenance of high-quality solar systems.
Specializes in smart, secure, and energy-efficient automation for homes and businesses.

International high-technology and fast growing group company. Specializing in R&D, manufactures solar power system, solar panel, solar inverter & battery and solar water pump. More than 18 years solar experience.
Established in 1992, listed on the main board of the Shanghai Stock Exchange in November 2016. Focus on smart energy solutions.
Company integrates R&D and production of solar/energy products.
Leading provider of high-quality solar energy solutions. Participating at the 10th Solar Kenya 2026.
Fully registered solar supplies company in Kenya, committed to creating a brighter and more sustainable future.

Also known as Solareon. Kenyan company offering durable solar solutions, supplying high quality solar panels, inverters, lithium batteries, pumps, solar structures and mounting accessories from the best manufacturers at affordable prices.
Founded in 2019. Specializes in R&D, production, and sales of energy storage inverters, battery systems, heat pumps, and EV chargers.
